title: narcissus tazetta var. syriacus
intro: Narcissus tazetta var. syriacus, also known as the Syrian narcissus, is a type of bulbous perennial plant belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its alkaloids, which have been shown to have antispasmodic, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Narcissus tazetta var. syriacus include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of essential oils, teas, or infusions, and is also used in homeopathic medicine to treat various health conditions.
